title: PECULIARITIES APPLICATIONS TAX BENEFITS AND PREFERENCES IN ENTREPRENEURIAL ACTIVITIES
author: Ostanaqulov Alisher Abdurashidovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Abstract:  The article deals with theoretical questions ratio in the taxation system of terms such as tax relief and preference. The concept and essence of tax privileges and preferences, types and criteria for tax exemptions. based on the analysis conclusions that their similarities and distinctive features. And withdrawn proposals and theoretical recommendations of the scientific approach to the separation of these concepts.
steps_raw: Abstract:  The article deals with theoretical questions ratio in the taxation system of terms such as tax relief and preference. And withdrawn proposals and theoretical recommendations of the scientific approach to the separation of these concepts.
keywords: Keywords: taxation, tax system, term, tax benefit, tax preference, rate, base, deductions, tax credit, deferral, privilege.
